title: Volume 1 Chapter 1: The Mob of a Magical Girl Anime
series: Reincarnated as a Mob in a Magical Girl Anime
content: Chapter 1: The Mob of a Magical Girl Anime
Magical girls.
That is the title given to girls possessing special powers that do not exist in reality.
The abilities they wield are incredibly diverse, ranging from the power of ice and the power of thunder to the power of affection, light, and creation.

Magical girls are destined to fight against evil entities that threaten the peace of the people, and sometimes they get hurt in the process. However, they rise up over and over again, facing their enemies with a smile on their faces. Their heroic figures have deeply captivated the hearts of many.
Those magical girls were thought to exist only within fiction... but in this world, they actually exist. That is the common sense of this world, the world of a magical girl anime.
Above the city streets.
There, the battle between good and evil was unfolding once again today.
"Kufufufu... So you've shown up again today, you wretched magical girls...!"
A man with a zombie-like appearance, whose skin was so pale blue that you'd think he needed to go to a hospital immediately, muttered with a fearless smirk.
Facing him were five girls clad in adorable outfits.
"Of course we did! We won't let you destroy everyone's peace!"
"Oho... Then let's see you try... if you can defeat the great Rulerayagus!"
"We will definitely defeat you! Let's go, everyone!"
"Yeah..."
"Yes!"
"Of course."
"Yes ma'am."
Following the call of the leader magical girl, the other four magical girls charged in all at once.
"Hmph, a frontal assault is foolish!"
"Are you sure about that?"
Before he knew it, a girl in a yellow outfit was standing right behind the man.
"Wha—"
The man finally noticed the presence of the magical girl behind him and turned around, but it was already too late.
Sparks of electricity were already crackling across the twin swords held by the magical girl.
"Cross Thunder."
Immediately after, a fierce sound echoed as a lightning strike blasted the man.
"Gah— Impossi...ble... To think... something like this..."
The man, having taken the lightning strike directly, seemed to lack even the strength to maintain his levitation and slowly began to fall.
Barely clinging to life, the man would surely die from the fall if left alone. However, there was no way these magical girls—absolute evil-slaying women—would let him off the hook that easily.
"Everyone, finish him!"
At the quiet command of the girl in pink, everyone nodded silently and aimed their right hands at the man.
The next moment, beams of their respective attributes fired from their palms, striking the man head-on.
"No... way... To think that I... I am... so... sorry... Lord..."
And just like that, the man vanished, turning into dust.
Good grief, another victory for the magical girls today, huh.
The development I'm hoping for just isn't coming at all...
Watching the scene from the rooftop of a building, I stood alone and let out a deep sigh.
I am a reincarnator.
I died in my original world, and when I came to, I was in this world... I had reincarnated into the world of the magical girl anime that I loved so much in my past life.

However, I wasn't one of the magical girls, nor was I the boss of the villains... I was an ordinary mob character with zero presence, the kind you wouldn't even know existed in the story, or if I did, I'd be cut off at the edge of the screen. I was Sōta Hayami, a regular student at the school the magical girls attend.
No, seriously, who even is that?
Why does a mob like me have such a surprisingly decent name...?
Though I had a lot of things I wanted to retort to, I was currently enjoying this world to the fullest to the point where none of that mattered.
I love magical girls.
When I was little, while my classmates were watching hero shows, I was obsessed with magical girl anime. Was it because magical girls are cute? Sure, there's that.
But that's not the main reason. The thing that drew me to magical girls more than anything else was their 'kumorase'—their expressions of deep despair.
Magical girls, who usually smile with utmost confidence, falling into absolute despair when faced with a mighty enemy or seeing their comrades unable to move... I loved those scenes.
I vividly remember telling a girl I was close with about this, and she was incredibly creeped out by it...
But don't get me wrong. It's not like I enjoy bad endings. I want the despairing magical girls to stand back up and overcome it, too.

However, ever since I reincarnated into this world, unlike the anime, such scenes never arrive. All the enemies are way too weak and get defeated instantly. Seriously, what the hell is the enemy boss doing?
Well, whatever... Now then, I guess I'll get back to my hobby of making anime pilgrimages...
This abandoned building I'm visiting today... is actually the very location where one of the magical girls falls into darkness, undergoing 'yamiochi' due to the power of a Demon God.

That corruption scene was truly magnificent... The magical girl desperately resisting as the Demon God tries to take over her consciousness, despairing as she hurts her own friends with her own hands, until her mind is completely hijacked. That is a legendary scene that easily competes for first or second place in my personal 'kumorase' ranking.
"I think it was somewhere around here... Ah, found it!"
Clearing away the fine rubble, an ominously glowing magic circle appeared across the floor.

Yes, this magic circle! This is where the Demon God comes out from! And then it takes over the magical girl's body and goes on a rampage. ...Well, they said you needed some sort of qualification to summon it, so I won't be able to see the Demon God myself, though.
Even so, this is amazing... I visited a similar spot in my previous world, but the real deal hits completely different.
『...Who goes there.』
Hmm? I feel like I just heard something... Must be my imagination.
『Hey, you. Do not pass this off as your imagination. I am speaking to you.』
Lifting my eyes from the magic circle, I saw some mysterious, ominous entity shrouded in black mist hovering right above it.
Whoa... Are you kidding me, it actually came out...
"Why are you revived? You're not supposed to resurrect until a bit later, right?"
『I should be asking you, why are you in a place like this...』
"I'm just a mob on a holy pilgrimage."
『This is no holy land. This is the stage of ruin—』
"Yeah, yeah, I get it. I don't care about any of that, just go back already."
『You bastard! You've got quite the nerve, telling me to go back!』
Sigh, this Demon God is so annoying... Just go back home already... You have an incredibly important role to play in plunging a magical girl into darkness later...
"Ah, crap..."
Come to think of it, this guy can read minds, can't he... What do I do...
『I can hear you perfectly well... More importantly, you possess quite an amusing train of thought.』
"Don't just read people's minds without permission, it's gross."
『Do not say that. I have a good proposition for you. Why don't you harbor me within your body?』
"Huh?"
The proposal was so absurd that it honestly made me want to punch him.

Harbor this thing in my body? If I did that, I'd die, unable to withstand the sheer strength of his power. And even if by some miracle I survived, my body would be hijacked. There is absolutely no benefit for me.
『What? Should I phrase it like this? Make a contract with me and become a magical boy!』
"...I don't get it. What are you trying to do? There's no benefit in this for either you or me."
『Well, truth be told... Being trapped in a place like this has left me incredibly, unbelievably bored...』
I see, so basically this guy is just trying to possess my body because he's bored out of his mind... What are you, lonely?
"I have zero interest in you, end of story. If you understand, hurry up and go back."
『Now, now, do not be like that. There is something in it for you as well. If you use my power, you can fulfill your objective, you know?』
Those words caused my feet, which had been turning to leave, to stop dead in their tracks.
"What?"
『In other words... If you obtain my power, you will be able to save the magical girl known as Luna, who is apparently destined to die, no?』
I was deeply shocked by what the Demon God had just said.
This guy, did he just read my memories...?
The magical girl of this world... Luna, loses her life early on in the story.
Which means, I will never be able to witness Luna's 'kumorase' ever again.

So if I form a contract with this guy, I can change the world into one where Luna survives...? An act equivalent to completely shattering the original anime's scenario... However, 'kumorase' takes precedence over everything else! I want to see the magical girls despair!
"Alright, I'm in."
『...You are quite a simple-minded fellow... Well, I rather like that about you. Now then, let us form the contract. Come closer to me.』
"Yeah."
As instructed, I walked over to the Demon God resting on the magic circle. The circle flashed with a brilliant crimson light, and simultaneously, a thick miasma began to drift through the area.
Hey, hey... is this actually going to be okay?
『Then we shall begin... Try not to break.』
Saying that with a testing smirk, the Demon God smoothly slid right into my body.
Immediately after, a violent wave of agony shot through my entire body.
It was an intense pain, as if my whole body was fracturing and cracking apart.
Whoa... this is... pretty rough...
The pain was so strong that if I let my guard down for even a second, my consciousness would be swept away. I suppose enduring this is how I earn the qualification to wield the Demon God's power.
I'll do it. I'll do whatever it takes if it means I get to see that glorious despair!
"Haa... Haa... Finally, over..."
The pain continued for about an hour after that.
I almost lost consciousness several times halfway through, but I gave it my absolute all to endure it, telling myself it was all for the sake of 'kumorase'.
The vast power welling up inside me... It seems I successfully obtained the power.
『Just as I expected of the one I chose.』
The Demon God's voice echoed directly into my brain.
"You can still converse even in this state, huh."
『Indeed. From now on, we shall be together forever.』
Is this state going to last for the rest of my life...?
Knowing that everything I'm thinking is completely transparent to this guy makes me feel a bit uncomfortable.
But well, that's just a trivial matter. I will do what I must do.
『By the way, what is your name?』
"Sōta Hayami."
『Hmph, I am Voldia. A pleasure working with you.』
"Yeah."
『By the way, it seems a demon with a considerable amount of power is currently fighting the magical girls... What will you do?』
Hearing that, I closed my eyes and tried probing for presences myself, and sure enough, I was able to confirm the presence of the magical girls and a demon possessing great power.
"Yeah, I'm going, of course."
Now then, let's go worship some beautiful despair.
